text_block_list.text:
One day, Tokai Teio and Mejiro<n>McQueen are
summoned to the<n>student council office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hello.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's the important thing you've<n>gotta tell me,
Prez?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for summoning you both<n>here out of the
blue. There is<n>something I'd like to ask of you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'd like you both to be poster models<n>for the URA.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Modeling for a poster?!<n>Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That would be an honor indeed. I<n>gladly accept the
request.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But why am I being paired up with<n>McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Because I recommended her. Do you<n>have an
issue with that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You personally recommended her,<n>Prez? Then I
guess that's fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm also a little curious as to why<n>Teio and I have
been selected...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Why, you ask? Hmm. I could tell you,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This seems like a golden opportunity.<n>I have an
additional request for you<n>two.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Use your time to think about why the<n>other was
chosen.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! You want me to figure outwhy you picked her? Not even whyyou picked me?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're overthinking it. Just approach<n>it as a
simple challenge I've set out<n>for you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aww, it's not simple at all! How am I<n>supposed to
know why she chose<n>you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Besides, we're only having to rackour brains about this 'cause youinsisted on asking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I merely inquired as to the reason. I<n>believe the
real issue is your<n>willingness to accept whatever
the<n>president says without a second<n>thought!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I blindly accepted the<n>request... Well,
anyway. We both<n>agreed to this, so we'll just
have to<n>do the work.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't we make things<n>interesting?
Let's turn this into a<n>competition!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A competition? And how exactly will<n>we decide the
winner?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We give our answers to Prez and<n>whoever has
the right answer is the<n>winner. How's that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... Very well, then. But if we<n>really are
going to compete, I will<n>show you no mercy. Is that
clear?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Bring it on! Okay, ready... GO!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! Why are you running in thesame direction I am?! Do not hindermy case!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My plan is to ask everyone in the<n>classroom!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! That was my idea! Don'tyou copy me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I am not copying you! And couldyou please desist with that terriblehabit you have of blaming others?

The two of them push and shove<n>each other as
they race down the<n>hallway.
